# permitio_resource_instance (Resource)

Manages a Permit.io resource instance. Resource instances represent specific objects of a resource type (e.g., a specific document, project, or folder). See [the documentation](https://api.permit.io/v2/redoc#tag/Resource-Instances) for more information.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create a simple resource instance
resource "permitio_resource_instance" "doc_123" {
  key      = "doc-123"
  resource = "document"
  tenant   = "default"
}

# Create a resource instance with ABAC attributes
resource "permitio_resource_instance" "project_456" {
  key      = "proj-456"
  resource = "project"
  tenant   = "default"
  attributes = jsonencode({
    status     = "active"
    department = "engineering"
  })
}

# Create multiple resource instances using for_each
resource "permitio_resource_instance" "documents" {
  for_each = {
    "doc-1" = { tenant = "default" }
    "doc-2" = { tenant = "production" }
  }

  key      = each.key
  resource = "document"
  tenant   = each.value.tenant
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) The key. This is a unique identifier.
- `resource` (String) The resource type key that this instance belongs to.

### Optional

- `attributes` (String) Arbitrary resource instance attributes in JSON format that will be used to enforce attribute-based access control policies.
- `tenant` (String) The tenant key for multi-tenant enforcement.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The creation timestamp.
- `environment_id` (String) The environment ID.
- `id` (String) The resource ID.
- `organization_id` (String) The organization ID.
- `project_id` (String) The project ID.
- `resource_id` (String) The unique resource type ID.
- `updated_at` (String) The update timestamp.

## Import

Import resource instances using the format `resource_key:instance_key`:

```shell
terraform import permitio_resource_instance.example "document:doc-123"
```

Import examples:

```shell
# Import a document instance
terraform import permitio_resource_instance.doc_123 "document:doc-123"

# Import a project instance
terraform import permitio_resource_instance.project_456 "project:proj-456"
```
